meta_description: Enter your new password to complete the account recovery process on DaNangTrip.
title: Reset Password
subtitle: Please enter your new password to recover your account.
welcome_subtitle: Ensure your new password is strong, containing uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters.

invalid_token.title: Invalid Recovery Link
invalid_token.subtitle: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new recovery link.

success.title: Reset Successful!
success.subtitle: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now log in with your new password.

failure.general_error: An error occurred during processing. Please try again later.
